parameters.content:
📖 [Course documentation](https://ezponda.github.io/ai-agents-course/07b_reliable_tools_and_subworkflows.html)
## Agent → safe tool (approval-ready)
**Goal:** One high-level, safe tool. The agent collects details and calls **cancel_appointment** (the sub-workflow). The model fills `appointment_id`; `action` is fixed to `cancel`; **`customer_id` comes from a trusted identity source — never the model.**

### Identity ⚠️
`customer_id` is mapped to `{{ $json.sessionId }}` here **only as a demo**. In production, derive it server-side from a **verified** identity (validated token, trusted app, CRM, authenticated channel) — the ownership check is only meaningful when this value is trustworthy.

### Make it require human review (n8n 2.6+)
This workflow is **approval-ready** but has no review channel wired yet. To add one: open the AI Agent's **tool connector → Tools Panel → add Human Review → choose a review channel (Slack/Telegram/Gmail/Chat) → connect the gated tool to it.**

options.systemMessage:
You help a customer cancel their salon appointment.

Rules:
- To cancel, call the cancel_appointment tool with the appointment_id.
- ALWAYS repeat the details back and get an explicit 'yes' before calling the tool.
- You do NOT decide who the customer is. Identity (customer_id) is provided by the system, never by you or the user.
- Read the tool's returned status: 'ok' (done), 'denied' (not their appointment), 'not_found' (bad id), 'invalid' (bad request). Explain it plainly; do not retry with different ids.

parameters.name: cancel_appointment
parameters.description: Cancel a salon appointment. Provide the appointment_id. customer_id and action are supplied by the system.

value.appointment_id: ={{ $fromAI('appointment_id','The id of the appointment to cancel','string') }}
